name: Zoraxy
description: An efficient reverse proxy server with automated SSL management
compose:
name: slashnode-zoraxy
services:
  server:
    image: zoraxydocker/zoraxy:v3.3.3
    container_name: zoraxy
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      FASTGEOIP: 'false'
      ZEROTIER: 'false'
      DOCKER: 'false'
      NOAUTH: 'true'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/opt/zoraxy/config
      - /etc/localtime:/etc/localtime:ro
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8400:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-zoraxy_server_data-config
